song_name: X Ambassadors - Renegades - Vance Joy - Riptide
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
   Run away - ay with me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
   Lost souls and reverie[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
   Running wild and running free[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
   Two kids, you and me[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]
And I say[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Hey, hey hey hey[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
Living like we're renegades[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Hey hey hey[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
Hey hey hey[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
Living like we're renegades[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
Renegades, renegades[/tab]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
I was scared of dentists and the dark[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
I was scared of pretty girls and starting conversations[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, all my friends are turning green[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
You're the magician's assistant in their dreams[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Ooh, ooh, ooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Ooh, ooh, and they come unstuck[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Lady, running down to the riptide, taken away[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
To the dark side, I wanna be your left hand man[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
I love you when you're singing that song, and I got a lump[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
In my throat, 'cause you're gonna sing the words wrong[/tab]


[tab][ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Lady, running down to the riptide, taken away[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
To the dark side, I wanna be your left hand man[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
I love you when you're singing that song, and I got a lump[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
In my throat, 'cause you're gonna sing the words wrong[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
   Long live the pioneers[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
   Rebels and mutineers[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
   Go forth and have no fear[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
   Come close the end is near[/tab]


[tab][ch]F[/ch]
And I say[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Hey, hey hey hey[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
Living like we're renegades[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Hey hey hey[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
Hey hey hey[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
Living like we're renegades[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
Renegades, renegades[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
There's this movie that I think you'll like[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
This guy decides to quit his job and heads to New York City[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
This cowboy's running from himself[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
And she's been living on the highest shelf[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Ooh, ooh, ooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Ooh, ooh, and they come unstuck[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Lady, running down to the riptide, taken away[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
To the dark side, I wanna be your left hand man[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
I love you when you're singing that song, and I got a lump[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
In my throat, 'cause you're gonna sing the words wrong[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
   All hail the underdogs[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
  All hail the new kids[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
   All hail the outlaws[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
  Spielbergs and Kubricks[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
   It's our time to make a move[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
  It's our time to make amends[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
   It's our time to break the rules[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]
Let's begin...[/tab]


[tab][ch]F[/ch]
 And I say[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Hey, hey hey hey[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
Living like we're renegades[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Hey hey hey[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
Hey hey hey[/tab]

Living like we're renegades[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
Renegades, renegades[/tab]

[Solo] (fingerpicking)

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
I just wanna, I just wanna know[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
If you're gonna, if you're gonna stay[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
I just gotta, I just gotta know[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I can't have it, I can't have it any other way[/tab]

[Pre-chorus] (strum once and hold)
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
I swear she's destined for the screen[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Closest thing to Michelle Pfeiffer that you've ever seen, oh[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Lady, running down to the riptide, taken away[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
To the dark side, I wanna be your left hand man[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
I love you when you're singing that song, and I got a lump[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
In my throat, 'cause you're gonna sing the words wrong[/tab]
